projects - Konsole

root@host:~$

tail projects.log
  • Here are some of my open source projects created by me:
  • [ RUBY ]
    Paso - Rails app for short urls. Using the RailsUrlShortener engine.
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ RUBY ]
    RailsUrlShortener - Rails engine for providing url shortener functionalities.
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ PYTHON ]
    simple-fastapi-example - Simple API REST project created with FASTAPI
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ PYTHON ]
    sshdb - CLI tool for managing ssh connection's data. (host, user ...)
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ HTML ]
    Mypage - This personal site made with jekyll.
    ~> Preview Repository
